Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants 20 thought provoking open ended questions based on the described multinational supply chain process for smartphone manufacturing distribution No SQL queries Just list the questions focusing on insights potential issues strategies for improvement and implications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to make sure they are open ended thought provoking cover various aspects RD sourcing multi country suppliers assembly Malaysia logistics customs distribution strategies JIT vs aggregated inventory planning quality compliance digital systems analytics sustainability carbon footprint risks currency regulatory after sales recalls continuous improvement
